reasons: Gating hypothesis H-G1 passed: LDS residual variance 51.6% after class+gradient-norm control confirms genuine per-sample attribution structure exists
Infrastructure fully validated: dattri full-model EK-FAC feasible (10.43GB peak), multi-seed training fast, all 4 attribution methods produce valid scores

Primary pilot limitation (layer4+fc scope) has verified remedy: full-model Hessian computation changes eigenvalue scale from <0.001 to meaningful magnitudes, expected to make BSS perturbation factors non-uniform
Disagreement signal is strong (tau-LDS_diff rho=-0.55, p<1e-8) providing backup routing signal independent of BSS
Ensemble TRV stability validated (H-A3 LOO rho=0.85) confirming multi-seed averaging stabilizes per-point diagnostics
No hypothesis hit falsification threshold in a way attributable to conceptual flaws rather than pilot scope limitations
next_actions: Train 4 additional seeds to full 200 epochs (seeds 123, 456, 789, 1024)
Compute full-model EK-FAC and K-FAC attributions for 500 stratified test points using dattri
Re-run H-G1 variance decomposition with full-model data
Compute BSS with full-model eigenvalues and reduced damping
Evaluate cross-seed BSS stability (H-D1) across 5 seeds
Test gradient-norm-normalized BSS as robustness check
Compute TRAK-50 ground truth for 500 points
If BSS shows seed-stable predictive signal, proceed to Phase 3 adaptive routing

deferred_candidates.reason: H-G1 PASS (LDS residual 51.6%) weakens the 'class dominates everything' narrative. Keep as fallback if full-model experiments reveal class dominance increases with full-model Hessian.
No pilot evidence collected. Lower priority given positive signals from front-runner. Could revisit if BSS-based approach fails at full scale.

H-F1.reason: IF universally dominates RepSim in layer4+fc

pilot_evidence_summary.critical_limitation: All pilot results use layer4+fc Hessian scope. K-FAC/EK-FAC nearly identical (J10=0.995). Full-model computation is the essential next step.
pilot_evidence_summary.strongest_signal: tau-LDS_diff correlation (rho=-0.55) shows disagreement predicts attribution quality magnitude
pilot_evidence_summary.weakest_signal: BSS partial correlation with LDS (-0.076) and LOO validation (all correlations near zero)
